description: Golden-dataset values for the Gold enrichment of consumable.career_outcomes with 7 institution-level cost columns via LEFT JOIN on base.college_scorecard_institution. Values are independently verifiable against public U.S. Department of Education College Scorecard data at https://collegescorecard.ed.gov/ and against the materialized Iceberg table at /data/gold/iceberg_warehouse/consumable/career_outcomes.

values.description: MIT net_price_annual (verifiable via College Scorecard public profile)

traceability.derivation: LEFT JOIN on unitid from base.college_scorecard_institution — no transformation applied at Gold
traceability.verification_note: https://collegescorecard.ed.gov/school/?166683 — MIT average net price for federal-aid students. Consistent with MIT's need-based aid profile for a $79,850 sticker.

values.description: MIT cost_of_attendance_annual (verifiable via College Scorecard public profile)

traceability.derivation: COALESCE(costt4_a, costt4_p) computed at Silver, passed through at Gold
net_price_annual × 4 per BT-113 definition; invariant enforced by GLD-CSI-003

values.description: Princeton net_price_annual (lowest-priced Ivy due to generous aid)

traceability.verification_note: https://collegescorecard.ed.gov/school/?186131 — Princeton's no-loan financial aid policy produces the lowest net price among top-tier privates.

values.description: Stanford net_price_annual (verifiable via College Scorecard public profile)

traceability.derivation: LEFT JOIN on unitid from base.college_scorecard_institution
traceability.verification_note: https://collegescorecard.ed.gov/school/?243744 — Stanford average net price with need-based aid applied.

values.description: Harvard cost_of_attendance_annual (verifiable via College Scorecard public profile)

traceability.derivation: COALESCE(costt4_a, costt4_p) from Silver; LEFT JOIN to Gold

values.description: UC Berkeley tuition_in_state < tuition_out_of_state invariant (public institution tuition differential)

traceability.derivation: TUITIONFEE_IN passed through from Bronze via Silver
traceability.verification_note: https://collegescorecard.ed.gov/school/?110635 — UC Berkeley in-state tuition. At a public institution, in-state < out-of-state ($14,850 vs $45,627) per expected public-tuition differential.

values.description: Row count invariant: 69,947 total rows preserved by LEFT JOIN

traceability.derivation: COUNT(*) on Gold table; LEFT JOIN cannot drop rows
traceability.verification_note: Validates GLD-CSI-001. Re-promote must preserve the pre-enrichment row count exactly.
